atoms.name: Batch Processing
atoms.description: Supports batched inference requests processed asynchronously at reduced cost, with results retrieved after processing completes.

atoms.name: Function Calling
atoms.description: Ability to invoke structured tool definitions from model output. Enables agentic workflows where the model selects and calls tools based on context.

atoms.name: LoRA
atoms.description: Supports inference with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) fine-tuning adapters overlaid on base model weights at inference time.

atoms.name: Real-Time
atoms.description: Supports streaming output or real-time bidirectional interaction with low latency, suitable for voice agents and interactive UIs.

atoms.name: Reasoning
atoms.description: Enhanced chain-of-thought reasoning that produces step-by-step thinking before a final answer, improving accuracy on complex tasks.

atoms.name: Structured Output
atoms.description: Guarantees model output conforms to a caller-supplied JSON Schema or equivalent structure, stronger than JSON mode alone.

atoms.name: Vision
atoms.description: Ability to process image inputs alongside text for visual recognition, image reasoning, and captioning.

atoms.name: IndicTrans2 EN-Indic 1B
atoms.description: First open-source transformer-based multilingual NMT model supporting high-quality translation across all 22 scheduled Indic languages.

atoms.name: Gemma SEA-LION v4 27B IT
atoms.description: Southeast Asian Languages In One Network — LLMs pretrained and instruct-tuned for the Southeast Asia region.

atoms.name: BGE Base EN v1.5
atoms.description: General embedding base model transforming text into 768-dimensional vectors.

atoms.name: BGE Large EN v1.5
atoms.description: General embedding large model transforming text into 1024-dimensional vectors.

atoms.name: BGE M3
atoms.description: Multi-functionality, multi-linguality, and multi-granularity embedding model.

atoms.name: BGE Reranker Base
atoms.description: Reranker model that takes question and document as input and outputs a relevance similarity score.

atoms.name: BGE Small EN v1.5
atoms.description: General embedding small model transforming text into 384-dimensional vectors.

atoms.name: FLUX 1 Schnell
atoms.description: 12 billion parameter rectified flow transformer capable of generating images from text descriptions.

atoms.name: FLUX 2 Dev
atoms.description: Image model capable of generating highly realistic and detailed images with multi-reference support.

atoms.name: FLUX 2 Klein 4B
atoms.description: Ultra-fast distilled image model delivering state-of-the-art quality for interactive workflows and real-time previews.

atoms.name: FLUX 2 Klein 9B
atoms.description: Ultra-fast distilled image model with enhanced quality; unifies image generation and editing in a single model.

atoms.name: Stable Diffusion XL Lightning
atoms.description: Lightning-fast text-to-image generation model capable of producing high-quality 1024px images in a few steps.

atoms.name: Aura 1
atoms.description: Context-aware text-to-speech model applying natural pacing and expressiveness.

atoms.name: Aura 2 EN
atoms.description: Context-aware English text-to-speech model that applies natural pacing, expressiveness, and fillers based on context.

atoms.name: Aura 2 ES
atoms.description: Context-aware Spanish text-to-speech model that applies natural pacing, expressiveness, and fillers based on context.

atoms.name: Flux ASR
atoms.description: First conversational speech recognition model built specifically for voice agents.

atoms.name: Nova 3
atoms.description: Deepgram speech-to-text model for transcribing audio.

atoms.name: SQLCoder 7B 2
atoms.description: SQL-specialized model designed to help non-technical users understand and query data in SQL databases.

atoms.name: Embedding Gemma 300M
atoms.description: 300M parameter state-of-the-art open embedding model producing vector representations for search and retrieval; trained with data in 100+ languages.

atoms.name: Gemma 2B IT LoRA
atoms.description: Gemma 2B base model dedicated for inference with LoRA adapters.

atoms.name: Gemma 3 12B IT
atoms.description: 128K context window model with multilingual support in over 140 languages; handles text and image input.

atoms.name: Gemma 4 26B A4B IT
atoms.description: Google's most intelligent family of open models, derived from Gemini 3 research.

atoms.name: Gemma 7B IT LoRA
atoms.description: Gemma 7B base model dedicated for inference with LoRA adapters.

atoms.name: Gemma 7B IT
atoms.description: Lightweight, state-of-the-art open model built from the same research and technology as Gemini models.

atoms.name: DistilBERT SST-2 INT8
atoms.description: Distilled BERT model fine-tuned on SST-2 for sentiment classification.

atoms.name: Granite 4.0 H Micro
atoms.description: Industry-leading results in agentic tasks including instruction following and function calling; suited for RAG, multi-agent workflows, and edge deployments.

atoms.name: Lucid Origin
atoms.description: Most adaptable and prompt-responsive model with strengths in sharp graphic design, full-HD renders, and accurate text rendering.

atoms.name: Phoenix 1.0
atoms.description: Generates images with exceptional prompt adherence and coherent text rendering.

atoms.name: LLaVA 1.5 7B HF
atoms.description: Open-source multimodal chatbot trained by fine-tuning LLaMA/Vicuna on visual instruction data; supports image captioning and visual question answering.

atoms.name: DreamShaper 8 LCM
atoms.description: Stable Diffusion model fine-tuned to be better at photorealism.

atoms.name: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 32B
atoms.description: Distilled from DeepSeek-R1 based on Qwen2.5; outperforms OpenAI o1-mini on several benchmarks.

atoms.name: DETR ResNet-50
atoms.description: DETection TRansformer model trained end-to-end on COCO 2017 object detection dataset (118k annotated images).

atoms.name: Llama 2 7B Chat FP16
atoms.description: Full precision (fp16) generative text model with 7 billion parameters.

atoms.name: Llama 2 7B Chat HF LoRA
atoms.description: Llama 2 base model dedicated for inference with LoRA adapters.

atoms.name: Llama 2 7B Chat INT8
atoms.description: Quantized (int8) generative text model with 7 billion parameters.

atoms.name: Llama 3 8B Instruct AWQ
atoms.description: Quantized (int4) generative text model with 8 billion parameters.

atoms.name: Llama 3 8B Instruct
atoms.description: State-of-the-art performance on industry benchmarks with improved reasoning capabilities.

atoms.name: Llama 3.1 70B Instruct
atoms.description: Large multilingual model optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases.

atoms.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct AWQ
atoms.description: Quantized (int4) generative text model with 8 billion parameters.

atoms.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct Fast
atoms.description: Fast variant of Llama 3.1 8B optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases.

atoms.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct FP8
atoms.description: Llama 3.1 8B quantized to FP8 precision.

atoms.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct
atoms.description: Multilingual large language model optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases.

atoms.name: Llama 3.2 11B Vision Instruct
atoms.description: Multimodal model optimized for visual recognition, image reasoning, and captioning.

atoms.name: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct
atoms.description: Lightweight model optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases.

atoms.name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
atoms.description: Lightweight model optimized for multilingual dialogue including agentic retrieval and summarization.

atoms.name: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct FP8 Fast
atoms.description: Llama 3.3 70B quantized to fp8 precision and optimized for faster inference.

atoms.name: Llama 4 Scout 17B 16E Instruct
atoms.description: 17 billion parameter natively multimodal model with 16 experts (mixture-of-experts architecture).

atoms.name: Llama Guard 3 8B
atoms.description: Llama 3.1 8B fine-tuned for content safety classification in both LLM inputs and responses.

atoms.name: M2M-100 1.2B
atoms.description: Multilingual encoder-decoder model trained for many-to-many multilingual translation.

atoms.name: Llama 3 8B Instruct
atoms.description: State-of-the-art performance on a wide range of industry benchmarks.

atoms.name: Phi-2
atoms.description: Transformer-based model with next-word prediction objective, trained on 1.4T tokens from web and synthetic sources.

atoms.name: ResNet-50
atoms.description: 50 layers deep image classification CNN trained on more than 1 million images from the ImageNet dataset.

atoms.name: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.1
atoms.description: Instruct fine-tuned version of the Mistral-7B model.

atoms.name: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.2 LoRA
atoms.description: Mistral 7B instruct v0.2 dedicated for inference with LoRA adapters.

atoms.name: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.2
atoms.description: 32k context window instruct model with updated rope-theta and no sliding-window attention.

atoms.name: Mistral Small 3.1 24B Instruct
atoms.description: State-of-the-art vision understanding with long context capabilities up to 128k tokens.

atoms.name: Kimi K2.5
atoms.description: Frontier-scale open-source model with a 256k context window.

atoms.name: Kimi K2.6
atoms.description: Frontier-scale open-source 1T parameter model with a 262.1k context window, designed for agentic workloads.

atoms.name: MeloTTS
atoms.description: High-quality multi-lingual text-to-speech library.

atoms.name: Hermes 2 Pro Mistral 7B
atoms.description: Upgraded, retrained version of Nous Hermes 2 with function calling and JSON mode capabilities.

atoms.name: Nemotron 3 120B A12B
atoms.description: Hybrid MoE model with leading accuracy for multi-agent applications.

atoms.name: GPT OSS 120B
atoms.description: Open-weight model designed for production, general-purpose, high-reasoning use cases.

atoms.name: GPT OSS 20B
atoms.description: Open-weight model optimized for lower latency and local or specialized use cases.

atoms.name: Whisper Large v3 Turbo
atoms.description: Pre-trained model for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speech translation.

atoms.name: Whisper Tiny EN
atoms.description: English-only version of the Whisper Tiny model trained on speech recognition.

atoms.name: Whisper
atoms.description: General-purpose speech recognition model supporting multilingual recognition, speech translation, and language identification.

atoms.name: PLaMo Embedding 1B
atoms.description: Japanese text embedding model that converts Japanese text input into numerical vectors for information retrieval, text classification, and clustering.

atoms.name: SmartTurn v2
atoms.description: Open source community-driven native audio turn detection model in its second version.

atoms.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B Instruct
atoms.description: Code-specific large language model supporting six mainstream model sizes from 0.5B to 32B parameters.

atoms.name: Qwen3 30B A3B FP8
atoms.description: Latest generation large language model with groundbreaking advancements in reasoning, instruction-following, and agent capabilities.

atoms.name: Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B
atoms.description: Latest Qwen family model specifically designed for text embedding and ranking.

atoms.name: QwQ 32B
atoms.description: Medium-sized reasoning model capable of thinking deeply for hard problems; competitive with DeepSeek-R1 and o1-mini.

atoms.name: Stable Diffusion v1.5 Img2Img
atoms.description: Generate a new image from an input image using Stable Diffusion.

atoms.name: Stable Diffusion v1.5 Inpainting
atoms.description: Stable Diffusion model with inpainting capability using a mask to selectively edit image regions.

atoms.name: Stable Diffusion XL Base 1.0
atoms.description: Diffusion-based text-to-image model that generates and modifies images based on text prompts.

atoms.name: UForm Gen2 Qwen 500M
atoms.description: Small generative vision-language model primarily designed for image captioning and visual question answering.

atoms.name: GLM-4.7 Flash
atoms.description: Fast and efficient multilingual text generation model with a 131,072 token context window supporting 100+ languages.
